understanding.current_goal: Add secure OAuth-based login and session management for the SaaS dashboard.
understanding.latest_decision: Adopt OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow with PKCE for dashboard login to balance security with implementation complexity while avoiding password storage.
understanding.active_task: SaaS dashboard authentication (OAuth 2.0 + PKCE) — OAuth callback handler and encrypted session middleware are implemented and wired into dashboard route guards.
understanding.next_action: Write integration tests validating session lifecycle: cookie validation, session expiry, and unauthenticated redirect against guarded dashboard routes.

patch.next: Draft integration tests for cookie validation and unauthenticated-redirect on guarded dashboard routes; then add session-expiry test cases and run the full integration suite to verify route guards reject expired or missing session cookies.
patch.summary: OAuth 2.0 + PKCE dashboard auth implementation in progress; OAuth callback handler scoped. Encrypted session middleware implemented and wired into dashboard route guards. Integration test scaffolding started for cookie validation and unauthenticated-redirect scenarios; remaining work is session-expiry test cases and full-suite verification against guarded dashboard routes.

update.reason: Records that initial integration test scaffolding for cookie validation and unauthenticated redirect has begun, narrowing the remaining next step to session-expiry tests and full-suite execution.
